content:
# Theme: PaperMod parameters
env = "production"
title = "LuoYun Insights — Data-Driven Software Reviews"
description = "Expert software comparisons, reviews, and buying guides for businesses"
keywords = ["software reviews", "software comparison", "SaaS", "business tools"]
author = "LuoYun Insights Team"

# Date format
DateFormat = "January 2, 2006"

# Google AdSense
[adsense]
  enabled = false  # Set to true when AdSense is approved
  publisher_id = "ca-pub-XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX"  # Your AdSense publisher ID
  auto_ads = true  # Enable Auto Ads

# Home page
[home]
  profileMode = false

# Social & SEO
[social]
  showShareButtons = true
  shareOnLinkedIn = true
  shareOnTwitter = true
  shareOnFacebook = true
  shareOnReddit = true

# SEO
[seo]
  enableJSONLD = true
  enableOpenGraph = true
  enableTwitterCards = true

# Appearance
[appearance]
  showReadingTime = true
  showWordCount = false
  showTableOfContents = true
  showBreadcrumbs = true
  showRelatedPosts = true
  relatedPostsLimit = 6
  showCodeCopyButtons = true
  showFullTextInRSS = false

# Search
[search]
  enable = true
  type = "fuse"  # or "algolia"

# Comments (placeholder for future)
[comments]
  enable = false
